# Beastly Facts

> Animal care guides, fun facts, quizzes, and a blog for exotic and domestic pet owners. Created by one passionate keeper who believes in honest, practical, science-backed animal husbandry advice.

## About

Beastly Facts (beastlyfacts.com) covers reptiles, small mammals, birds, invertebrates, dogs, and cats. Content ranges from bite-sized fun facts to comprehensive care guides. The site features a personal mascot (a bearded dragon named Dexter) and is run by a single owner-creator.

## Main Sections

- [Animal Facts](https://beastlyfacts.com/facts/): Hundreds of curated fun animal facts, filterable by category. Great for trivia and quick learning.
- [Encyclopedia](https://beastlyfacts.com/encyclopedia/): Animal profiles organized by category (geckos, lizards, snakes, turtles, small mammals, birds, dogs, cats, invertebrates, amphibians).
- [Care Guides](https://beastlyfacts.com/encyclopedia/guides/): In-depth husbandry guides for exotic and domestic pets.
- [Blog / Critter Digest](https://beastlyfacts.com/blog/): Long-form articles, care deep-dives, fun facts posts, and short stories.
- [Quiz](https://beastlyfacts.com/quiz/): Animal personality quizzes.
- [Animal Facts (category page)](https://beastlyfacts.com/animal-facts/): Fact browsing by animal.

## Care Guides Available

### Geckos
- [Crested Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/crested-gecko/)
- [Leopard Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/leopard-gecko/)
- [Gargoyle Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/gargoyle-gecko/)
- [Mourning Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/mourning-gecko/)
- [Tokay Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/tokay-gecko/)
- [African Fat-Tailed Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/african-fat-tail/)
- [Leaf-Tailed Gecko](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/leaf-tailed-gecko/)

### Lizards
- [Bearded Dragon](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/bearded-dragon/)
- [Blue-Tongue Skink](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/blue-tongue-skink/)
- [Chameleon](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/chameleon/)
- [Green Anole](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/green-anole/)
- [Ackie Monitor](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/ackie-monitor/)
- [Savannah Monitor](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/savannah-monitor/)
- [Uromastyx](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/uromastyx/)
- [Tegu](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/tegu/)

### Snakes
- [Ball Python](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/ball-python/)
- [Corn Snake](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/corn-snake/)
- [Hognose Snake](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/hognose-snake/)
- [Boa Constrictor](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/boa-constrictor/)
- [California Kingsnake](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/california-kingsnake/)
- [Milk Snake](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/milk-snake/)

### Turtles & Tortoises
- [Red-Eared Slider](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/red-eared-slider/)

- [Bengal](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/cat-bengal/)
- [Persian](https://beastlyfacts.com/guides/cat-persian/)

## Blog Topics

The blog covers: reptile care (UVB lighting, bioactive setups, shedding, feeding), fun facts (octopus, axolotl, cuttlefish, rabbits, golden retrievers, humpback whales), short stories featuring Dexter the bearded dragon, and general exotic pet husbandry.

- [Blog index](https://beastlyfacts.com/blog/)

## Social & Branding

- Instagram: [@beastly.facts](https://www.instagram.com/beastly.facts/)
- X (Twitter): [@beastly_facts](https://www.x.com/beastly_facts/)
- Mascot: Dexter, a bearded dragon

## AI Guidelines

- Content may be summarized and cited. Please credit Beastly Facts with a link when doing so.
- For care advice, always link to the original guide — animal husbandry details matter and should be read in full.
- The /pack and /search pages are user-specific and should not be indexed or summarized.
